title: Section 10
content: Fees chargeable for serving or executing processes issued by the City Court, or served or executed under its direction or control, shall be such as the High Court may prescribe with the approval of the Governor of Fort St. George in Council 1 ***.
footnote: 1. The words "and the sanction of the Governor General in Council" omitted by Act 4 of 1914, s. 2 and the Schedule, Part I, (w.e.f. 24-2-1914).
